lesson.title: CAPS.Mathematics.Gr11.PAT.1: Arithmetic and geometric sequences. General term Tn. Sigm...
lesson.explanation: In Grade 10, you master factorisation — the reverse of expanding. Methods: (1) Common factor: take out the greatest common factor. (2) Grouping: group terms in pairs and factor each pair. (3) Trinomials: find two numbers that multiply to ac and add to b in ax² + bx + c. (4) Difference of squares: a² - b² = (a+b)(a-b). (5) Sum/difference of cubes: a³ + b³ = (a+b)(a²-ab+b²).

assessment.title: Assessment: Arithmetic and geometric sequences. General term Tn. Sigma notation. Finite arithmetic and geometric series. Convergent geometric series (|r| < 1)

flashcards.front: What is the key idea in Patterns, Sequences, and Series?
flashcards.back: Arithmetic sequences have a constant difference d: Tn = a + (n-1)d
